# Jobs — Infographic Data

> Generated from repos.json + content.json | 2026-04-07

## Header

- Title: Access To Jobs
- Subtitle: Workforce navigation for every Missouri county
- Brand color: #7A6F5B
- Icon: jobs

## Key Numbers

- **counties:** 114

## Ecosystem Stats

- 6 pillars of human access
- 7 active projects
- 400+ modules of domain content
- 114 Missouri counties served

## Audience

- workforce development staff
- job seekers
- career counselors

## How It Works (3 Steps)

1. **Clone** — Download the repo from GitHub
2. **Upload** — Add SKILL.md to a Claude Project
3. **Converse** — Claude becomes your jobs expert

## Use Cases

- Match a job seeker to WIOA-eligible training programs in their county
- Navigate On-the-Job Training funding requirements
- Build a career pathway from assessment to placement

## Connections

Jobs connects to:
- Education
- Services
- Housing


## Cross-Pillar Story: Career Builder

**Persona:** A displaced worker retraining for a new career
**Flow:** education → jobs → services → business
**Narrative:** Align skills to standards, match to WIOA-funded training, navigate benefits during transition, and explore entrepreneurship.

## Call to Action

Navigate workforce programs
https://dougdevitre.org | github.com/dougdevitre/access-to-jobs

- Primary color: #7A6F5B

- Heading font: DM Serif Display
- Body font: DM Sans
- Layout: vertical scroll or single-page poster
